学校层次与声誉.text: It is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. Its main ranking on the Soft Science Ranking is approximately 198th (2025), fluctuating between 180–200 in recent years, placing it in the lower-middle tier of 211 universities. There are no records related to Qinghai University in the reputation file, and no significant positive or negative public opinion is observed. 专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the cooling trend of a significant backward shift in 2025 rankings, the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, a substantial increase in local physics category candidates (+15.6%), the low level of the university, and its remote geographical location, competition is expected to slightly intensify in 2026.
